response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a live concert performance featuring Momosuzu Nene.
2. 00:00 - 01:32: Performed song 1, '青春のラプソディ'. Searched for lyrics using title and original artists (Tsujimura Yuki/Ito Ken).
3. 01:33 - 03:23: MC segment (no vocal music).
4. 03:24 - 05:07: Performed song 2, 'Realize!'. Searched for lyrics using title and original artist (Itakura Takanori). Note: Performer-credited composer (Hiiro Yuka) was ignored in favor of the original composer per instructions.
5. Constructed the JSON object with the detected scenes and retrieved full lyrics for both songs.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live concert performance by VTuber Momosuzu Nene and other performers. The video includes two full vocal song performances ('青春のラプソディ' and 'Realize!') separated by a talk (MC) segment.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don't run away, don't give up, don't stop, don't quit
Not enough, can't erase, immature words, not needed
Don't wake up, don't get depressed, don't break, one more time
Don't run away, don't give up, don't stop, don't quit
Not enough, can't erase, emotions swirling, a song of not-at-all
Youth, Ready Go! Wow oh oh oh...

Comparing myself to the person next to me, I feel pathetic
Blue spring, secrets, "I hope I can laugh someday"
Longing is Sweet, trying to compete
What I'm seeking is Sweets, Complicated!
Bargaining, running out, in a trance
Deliver my feelings, tightly, more strongly
We are dyed in a world that touches the heart, and then Good!
Give a thumbs up, Smile, it starts bursting out
So, let's talk about the future ahead forever
The answer is up to me
